recommended_posts.title: Returning after 2 years......
recommended_posts.body: As...title said....i basically stopped playing Genshin Impact in 2023-2024, relogging just to get primogems and pulling every now and then every update.....And holy shit i'm getting overwhelmed by things to do ahahaha, new features, MANY quests, pgs i never did quest for (Alice and probably more, ju

recommended_posts.title: Daily Questions Megathread (March 31, 2026)
recommended_posts.body:
Ask about anything about the game that doesn't necessarily require a dedicated thread.

That is, if your question can be answered rather quickly/without significant  difficulty (e.g. "Can my phone run this game?"), ask here. If you think your question can contribute to some constructive discussions
